note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). Every scenario here drives the real modules/schedule/cronicle connector + core/schedule seam against an in-process fake Cronicle mirroring the live wire shapes.

scenarios.name: A maintenance window and scheduled jobs are derived from real scheduler events
A change-freeze overrides an overlapping maintenance window
Outside a sanctioned window the actuation is deferred to POLL_PAUSE
An unreadable schedule fails closed to outside the window
The connector re-reads each event by id and reflects an upstream change
The API key is a sealed SecretRef and a wrong key fails closed
The connector reads over a native HTTP client and actuates nothing
